description_long: This is a large, modern sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, angular receiver. The rifle features a fixed stock with a pronounced cheek rest and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver is equipped with a scope mount, though no optical sight is currently attached. The muzzle is fitted with a prominent muzzle brake, designed to reduce recoil. The overall finish is a combination of matte black and metallic gray, giving it a tactical, utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern, heavy-barreled sniper rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and a prominent muzzle brake. The finish is matte black and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, long barrel, and prominent muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the angular receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, revealing the magazine, trigger, and the details of the stock and receiver.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel.
